name: Navro
description: Payments curation platform providing global pay-in/pay-out infrastructure via a single API.

seo.title: Navro — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Navro: Payments curation platform providing global pay-in/pay-out infrastructure via a single API.

when_to_use: Routing global pay-ins across 150+ countries via one API
Consolidating multi-currency payouts for global platforms
Switching PSP providers without re-integration overhead
Unifying reconciliation data from multiple payment rails

cons: Routing opacity for sensitive ops teams
review.verdict: Interesting curation layer for global payouts — worth evaluating against Thunes and dLocal for coverage fit.
review.best_for: Platforms wanting one API to access global pay-in and pay-out rails
review.not_for: Teams that need direct provider relationships or single-country scope

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
